appliedUpdates.description: Documented the compose-runtime restart command with explicit MailHog SMTP overrides because inherited `.env` mail credentials caused reset probes to fail with `503 SYS_004`, and noted that `/actuator/health` can stay DOWN while auth/admin APIs remain usable.

environmentConstraints: The delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` helper still could not launch because the local Task runner references `custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`; validation was completed directly in-session.
The compose runtime still reports `503 {"status":"DOWN"}` on `http://localhost:9090/actuator/health`, so runtime readiness was judged from the target auth/admin API probes instead of actuator alone.
